headline: CoStar burnout: Time to turn the lights out for Homes.com?
summary: For years, CoStar Group (CSGP) CEO Andy Florance has defended a relentless capital expenditure strategy by pointing to a $100 billion real estate total addressable market (TAM) he believes his company is destined to lead. At the heart of that bet is Homes.com, the platform Florance has pitched as ...

headline: CoStar Group Corrects D. E. Shaw’s Highly Misleading Claims
summary: ARLINGTON, Va., March 11, 2026--CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP), a leading provider of online real estate marketplaces, information, analytics, and 3D digital twin technology in the property markets, today issued the following statement.
